---
title: "NotebookLM — legacy more.design — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Captura legacy de 2026-03-30 (conta extinta). Parquets _manual_ via parser legacy."
source-title: "NotebookLM legacy more.design"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "notebooklm"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "NotebookLM (legacy more.design)"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#0F9D58"  # Google green (legacy)
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "NotebookLM"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["sources", "notes", "outputs", "guide_questions", "source_guides"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = "3"  # account-3 = legacy more.design

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **NotebookLM legacy more.design.** Conta extinta (`more.design`, pt-BR),
> capturada em 2026-03-30 pelo extractor antigo do projeto-mae. Snapshot
> raw em `data/external/notebooklm-snapshots/more-design-2026-03-30/`,
> parquets `notebooklm_manual_*.parquet` via parser legacy
> (`capture_method = 'legacy_notebooklm_more_design'`). 11 notebooks /
> 33 msgs / 27 outputs / 6 briefs.
>
> Para visao das 3 contas: [`notebooklm.qmd`](notebooklm.html).
> account-1: [`notebooklm-acc-1.qmd`](notebooklm-acc-1.html). account-2:
> [`notebooklm-acc-2.qmd`](notebooklm-acc-2.html).

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
